mutators.name: Flat Rates
mutators.rules: No streak bonus tonight, but every question pays double base points.
mutators.intro: Tonight the accountants took over the booth. Flat Rates: no streak bonus, but every question pays double.

mutators.name: Thin Ice
mutators.rules: Start with 2 lives; a bonus life comes every 2nd completed round.
mutators.intro: Careful out there, contestant — we're on Thin Ice. Two lives to start, but the booth tops you up every other round.

mutators.name: Long Haul
mutators.intro: Stretch your legs, night owls. It's the Long Haul: seven questions a round, all the way down.

mutators.name: Heavy Rotation
mutators.rules: Harder questions all night, worth 50 percent extra points.
mutators.intro: We're spinning Heavy Rotation tonight. Nothing but the hard stuff — and it pays half again extra.

mutators.name: Single Signal
mutators.rules: Every round draws from the same theme, all night.
mutators.intro: One frequency, one theme, all night long. Tonight, we ride the Single Signal.
